description: Complete GD-1's strike sweep of peninsular_strain_v30 (~8 live co-victory sites: §6.3 + L129/220/310/457/493/571/590). Sibling victory_v30 §0.1 was banner-swept; peninsular_strain never was because GD-1's hand-maintained propagation list omits it (residual of the tracked pending Pass-2k batch, canonical_sources.yaml FACTION-SPECIFIC-VICTORY-PATHS). ACTION: sweep with [SUPERSEDED-BY: GD-1] banners; derive sweep targets by grep, not by GD-1's list (see ED-IN-0007). RATIFIED-AS-ACCEPTED by Jordan 2026-07-05 (post-merge instruction on PR #77; audit: designs/audit/2026-07-04-ners-qualitative-audit/ed_options.md E-5 (audit F-5)).

MS/RS world-stability track: MS (MENDING STABILITY) WINS (fork resolved by Jordan — the direction ED-731/ED-772's sweep was already heading). threadwork_v30 §5 reads MS; params/threadwork.md still reads RS (the sweep never reached it); names_index registers the rename at enforce:warn only; relitigated 3x (ED-428 keep RS -> ED-731 propagate MS -> ED-772 continue sweep). ACTION: complete the MS sweep across params/threadwork.md + victory's MS clock reference + any residual RS carriers; flip the names_index entry to enforce:block. PRECONDITION for any typed engine-params export binding this track (CLAUDE.md §5). RATIFIED-AS-ACCEPTED by Jordan 2026-07-05 (post-merge instruction on PR #77; audit: designs/audit/2026-07-04-ners-qualitative-audit/ed_options.md E-8).

Ambient-fabric window + revelation surface (edge-playability EP-7). The NPC world computes an opinion of the player it is structurally unable to show them: scene.interaction/scene.gossip are emitted with hard-coded private_observers [npc_a, npc_b] (six sites in political_dynamics_keys_migration_v30 incl. the visibility defaults), so the player can never overhear gossip about themselves; and the one specified revelation surface — npc_behavior_v30 §6.1/§6.1b 'Appraise Revelation' — is an empty header, with npc_memory doc:null. ACTION: (a) a single 'overheard' rule — gossip/interaction Keys gain a conditional player observer when the player shares the scene; (b) write the §6.1/§6.1b procedures (which Belief, in what form, on Overwhelming Appraise/Read). RATIFIED-AS-ACCEPTED by Jordan 2026-07-05 ('Ratify all' on PR #81; audit: designs/audit/2026-07-05-edge-playability-audit/edge_playability_audit_v1.md §7 item 10.

OPT-4, filed per Jordan's 2026-07-07 "ratify all" ruling (ED-IN-0026). Turmoil victory-gate repair (C-REACH-5, C-NERSPESS-3): the 'Political Stability <= 6' GD-1 leg reads a clock nothing writes (permanently vacuous). DESIGN CALL RULED: wire Turmoil writes (peninsular_strain is the natural owner) rather than re-spec the GD-1 gate against a live clock — weakening a hard GD rule is the last resort, not the first move, when the fix is to make an existing clock live instead.

OPT-5, filed per Jordan's 2026-07-07 "ratify all" ruling (ED-IN-0026). Threadwork execution reconciliation: execute ED-871 (Mending cost 0, ruled 2026-05-31, never landed) across threadwork_v30 §3.2 + operations.py; fix the blanket degree-penalty (C-TW-3), the inverted POP cap (C-TW-4), the missing eligibility gates (C-TW-10/11); implement or banner Thread Fatigue (C-TW-6) and Co-Movement invocation (C-TW-8); update knots.py to the ED-912 gauge (C-TW-12). STRATUM-A SLICE EXECUTED 2026-07-07 (this PR): ED-871's doc side is done — threadwork_v30 §3.2 Mending Coherence cost −1 → 0 (matching the doc's own §2.4 + canon/02 Amendment 3). Remainder stays open as Stratum B: sim/thread/operations.py still charges −1/−2 (entangled with the C-TW-3 blanket-penalty bug, no test coverage); C-TW-3/4/6/8/10/11; knots.py (C-TW-12); the anchoring cadence cap is a fresh design call (never ruled — resolution_plan §3's '1/season/Knot' value is not canon) — flagged needs_jordan. · UPDATE 2026-07-08 (Stratum-B slice PR): ED-871 is now CLOSED end-to-end — the sim side landed (sim/thread/operations.py: attempt_mending base cost -1 -> 0, and Mending exempted from the blanket Partial/Failure degree-penalty so all four degrees net 0 per canon) with a pinned regression test (sim/tests/test_thread_mending_ed871.py; threadwork previously had zero coverage). STILL OPEN in this ED: C-TW-3 (blanket penalty also mis-hits Leap), C-TW-4/6/8/10/11, and the knots.py ED-912 rebuild (C-TW-12). · UPDATE 2026-07-08 (knots.py rebuild PR): C-TW-12 CLOSED — sim/personal/knots.py rebuilt onto the ED-912 bidirectional -5..+5 gauge (TIER_RANGE/TIER_START; rupture at +5; -5 Tempered Close-only absorb-once; break/betrayal Disposition -3; positive-strain Close-break Conviction Scar) matching the doc side (knots_v30 §6 / fieldwork_v30 §5.6b), with a pinned test sim/tests/test_knots_ed912.py (7 cases; knots had zero coverage). Also closes ED-FI-0003's noted sim residual. STILL OPEN in ED-WR-0005: C-TW-3 (Leap blanket-penalty), C-TW-4/6/8/10/11.

OPT-12, filed per Jordan's 2026-07-07 "ratify all" ruling (ED-IN-0026). NPC orphan triage ED (the workplan T2 default, executed per the C-NPC disposition proposal): one consolidated Conviction/Ethics/TS migration-completion ED (~250-300 findings), small individually-judged mechanical set (~10-15), naming-verification pass (Reichard confirmed still live -- gap-closure G4), retire the self-refuting note category. Also assigns the missing NPC lane ownership (C-STUB-7).

RATIFIED subtractive verdicts for the WR action surface — Scene Slate + threadwork (ED-IN-0027; decision ratified, EXECUTION this WR-lane follow-up). Scene Slate: Step 6 Territorial MERGE (NPC-arrival -> Step 5) with the Thread-phenomenon clause CUT (the one embedded top-level CUT — preferred over merge to protect Step 2b's scarcity discipline); Step 7 Ambient DISTILL (minor filler Step 6 can deliver without a dedicated numbered Step); Witness-Mode Narrative-Input DISTILL (critic-downgraded P2->P3 — inert beat, NPC AI treats the player as absent; authoring debt, not a narrowed choice); Step 4 Conviction-Aligned REFINE (replace capitalization-as-signal with explicit keyword-tagging). Threadwork (WR-lane): Past-Oriented Pulling DISTILL (its Ob replaces Depth+Breadth+Distance entirely — scale-blind; folds into generalized Pulling, realizing the orphaned 'POP Binding' TN row); Mending REFINE (collective/Einhir 'approaches' are the same operation + Ob table at scale, not a real 3-approach menu; Amendment-3 zero-cost asymmetry untouched). Docket rows: ed_options.md WR + TW sections. · EXECUTED 2026-07-08 (WR-lane follow-up to ED-IN-0027, resolves this ED). player_agency_v30 §4 Scene Slate: Step 6 slimmed to 'Territorial Texture' (Thread-phenomenon clause CUT -> Step 2b owns it; NPC-arrival MERGED -> Step 5), Step 7 Ambient DISTILLED into a Step-6 backfill clause, Witness-Mode narrative-input DISTILLED into the Read/Appraise outcome (the GM mechanic was never re-derived for the no-GM engine), Step 4 validator REFINED (capitalization-as-signal -> explicit confirmation prompt). threadwork_v30 §2: Past-Oriented Pulling DISTILLED (temporal-target variant folded into Pulling's Three-Axis Ob, capability kept; physical fold with C-TW-3/4/10/11 Stratum B), Mending REFINED (Q-robust mono-solution flagged for a second Gap-repair branch/scarcity dimension; zero-cost/Amendment-3/ED-871 explicitly untouched). Scene-Slate Steps retained as numbered anchors until a rebuild renumbers §4.2/§4.3/§4.5. No sim edits. Gates green. Decision packet prepared 2026-07-08 for the Mending second-branch residual: designs/audit/2026-07-08-pessimist-action-audit/decision_packets/DP-3_WR-TW_mending_second_branch.md lays out four options (A retune the self-close fallback / B opposeable variant / C scarcity dimension / D decline the fork) for Jordan to rule -- no new ED allocated yet; the zero-Coherence-cost ruling (Amendment 3, ED-871) is untouched by every option.

Content-loss: the P-25 'Scale-based Mending Stability' override table in threadwork_v30.md (line 40) is truncated to its header row plus the single label 'Object' with ZERO data rows -- the blockquote literally ends '... Override degree table Mending Stability values with the following: | Scale | Partial Mending Stability Cost | Failure Mending Stability Cost | |---|---|---| | Object |' and stops. The audit confirmed via git log --follow -p that this is an ORIGINAL authoring truncation, not a regression (no prior revision ever carried complete data). This leaves the scale-override behavior for Mending Stability (Object/Personal/Relational/Territorial/Structural x Partial/Failure MS cost) entirely unspecified, so P-25's stated rule ('override the degree-table MS values') is uncomputable. Proposed remediation: author the full override table (all scale bands x Partial/Failure MS cost). Lane WR per the threadwork audit's own routing (threadwork has no dedicated ED lane); can anchor a WR-lane threadwork batch alongside the threadwork P2 tail (D3/D4/D8/D9/D10/D11/D12/D14). Surfaced by the 2026-07-13 multi-agent audit (mechanic_audit threadwork D1 / formula_audit A7).
